events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at Borussia Dortmund

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund scored twice in five second-half minutes to come back and beat Union Berlin 4-2 on Saturday to climb to second in the Bundesliga.
headlines.shortLinkText: Unbeaten Dortmund go second with comeback win

video.headline: Dortmund come alive in second half to beat Union Berlin

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Borussia Dortmund vs. FC Union Berlin - Game Highlights) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

headlines.description: VfB Stuttgart's record-breaking forward Serhou Guirassy scored a hat-trick in a 3-1 comeback win over visiting VfL Wolfsburg on Saturday, stretching his sensational run to 13 goals from seven Bundesliga matches and lifting his team into top spot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Record-breaking Guirassy scores hat-trick to put Stuttgart top

video.headline: Sehrou Guirassy's hat trick powers VfB Stuttgart to victory

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Sehrou Guirassy’s hat trick powers VfB Stuttgart to victory) 2023/10/07 ESHEET
